description: DTRO v3.5.1 Data Specification JSON schema

otherAccessRestriction.description: Free text description of other access restrictions.

provisionActionType.description: Indicates the nature of update between D-TRO records or their constituent parts

actualStartOrStop.description: Object supporting the recording of actual start and stop dates and times

eventAt.description: Indicates the date / time of the related event

authority.description: Object indicating the authority issuing permits

name.description: Name of the authority issuing permits

calendarWeekInMonthType.description: Specification of periods defined by relevant calendar weeks in a month, see ISO 8601-1.

changeableTimeType.description: List of available changeable time types

comparisonOperatorType.description: The operator to be used in the vehicle characteristic comparison operation.

consultationName.description: Free text descriptive name for the consultation.

endOfConsultation.description: Time and date of the end of the consultation period

howToComment.description: How to comment on the proposal.

dayType.description: A list of days of the week

diversionRouteType.description: Indicates the nature of diversion route

diversionType.description: An object linking to different forms of diversion route.

driverCharacteristicsType.description: Indicates a specific type of driver characteristic

driverCondition.description: Object indicating condition related to driver characteristics

electricChargingCharacteristic.description: Electric charging characteristics of a vehicle.

charging.description: That the connected vehicle is currently being charged.

vehicleConnectedToCharger.description: That the vehicle is connected to charging infrastructure.

eventType.description: Indicates that the event represents an actual start or stop time

actualDateOfCessation.description: Date the Experimental Order was ceased

extensionEnumeration.description: User-definition of a new list entry.

instanceOfDayInMonth.description: Instance of a specific weekday within a month.

linearDirectionType.description: Applicable direction for a linear direction

linearType.description: Representations derived from a linear location

maximumGrossWeightCharacteristic.description: Gross weight characteristic of a vehicle.

maxStayNoReturn.description: Max duration for occupancy and minimum time to return.

numberOfAxlesCharacteristic.description: Number of axles characteristic of a vehicle.

numberOfOccupants.description: Conditional restrictions based on number of vehicle occupants

orderReportingPointType.description: Nature of the traffic regulation measure process Reporting Point.

otherCondition.description: any other specified conditions or exceptions

payloadType.description: The type of load carried by the vehicle.

permitSubjectToFee.description: Cost and restrictions relating to use of a permit

permitType.description: The type of the referenced permit

pointType.description: Representations derived from a point location

provision.description: Characteristics of a traffic regulation measure specified Provision.

comingIntoForceDate.description: Date the provision comes into force

rateLine.description: Rate line within a rate table

incrementPeriod.description: Time period for incrementing the rate line charge, minutes.

maxValue.description: Maximum monetary amount, two decimal places.

minValue.description: Minimum monetary amount, two decimal places.

sequence.description: Ordered sequence within the rate line collection.

usageCondition.description: Conditions on the use of this rate line.

value.description: Value of the fee, two decimal places.

rateLineCollection.description: Group of rate line elements within one rate table.

maxValueCollection.description: Maximum monetary amount, two decimal places.

minValueCollection.description: Minimum monetary amount, two decimal places.

sequence.description: Place in sequence of this rate line collection.

rateTable.description: Set of rate charges relating to one or more locations.

rateUsageConditionsType.description: List of rate usage condition types

regulatedPlace.description: Geographical and spatial location subject to a regulation

assignment.description: Subject to an assignment under s28(1) NRSWA 1991

busRoute.description: Relates to a bus route road

concession.description: Free text description of the regulated place

description.description: Free text description of the regulated place

isDynamic.description: Indicates if the regulation is dynamic

roadCondition.description: Characteristics concerning the type of road.

comingIntoForceDate.description: Date the TRO comes into force

section.description: Reference to the section of the TRO

statementDescription.description: Statement of the overall nature of the restriction

troName.description: Published title of the Traffic Regulation Order

specialDayType.description: Collection of special types of days.

speedLimitNatureType.description: type of speed limit value indicated

speedLimitValueType.description: List of speed limit value types

targetEnumeratedList.description: List of enumeration lists that may be extended

timeValidity.description: A continuous or discontinuous period of validity.

isPlaceholderTro.description: Whether the record is a placeholder.

unitOfMeasureEnum.description: Defines the unit used for the measure.

valueRange.description: Class defining a measurable quantity and related units.

valueRangeBoundary.description: Object defining a range boundary value and operator.

value.description: The quantity measure forming a measure boundary.

valueRangeClassEnum.description: Typifies the type of measured value.

vehicleEquipmentType.description: The type of equipment in use or on board the vehicle.

weightType.description: The meaning of the weight value
